mismatched_fact_examples.truth_value: Quantitative breakdown of yield strength increase in 12Al steel compared to 10Al (952 MPa vs. 470 MPa): solid solution ~203.11 MPa, grain refinement ~61.39 MPa, ferrite contribution ~50 MPa, and κ-carbide precipitation ~361.93 MPa.
